title: View Transitions API
desc: Create smooth animated transitions between page views in both SPAs and MPAs. Now supported in Chrome 111+.

title: /e/OS De-Googled Mobile Ecosystem
desc: Complete de-Googled mobile OS promoting privacy-focused web and app development independent of Big Tech services.

title: AI Code Generation on GitHub
desc: Growing ecosystem of AI-powered code generation tools on GitHub, from Copilot to specialized coding agents.

title: WebGPU API - Modern Graphics in Browser
desc: Next-gen GPU API for the web enabling high-performance graphics and compute. Spec finalized, browser support growing.

title: Omni: Open-Source Postgres Workplace Search
desc: Open-source tool for workplace search and chat built on Postgres, suitable for integrating into web applications.
